scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace client" "npm run dev --workspace server"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace client && npm run typecheck --workspace server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.check: npm run lint --workspace client && npm run typecheck && npm run test --workspace client && npm run test --workspace server && npm run build
